name: servicenow-pdi
description: Develop safely across configured ServiceNow instances through guarded MCP tools and an OOTB-first engineering workflow.

interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to configured ServiceNow instances through an OAuth-protected multi-instance MCP server and adds an OOTB-first workflow for safe development, debugging, delivery, rollback, and verification.
capabilities: Guarded ServiceNow record reads, table inspection, and writes
Scoped development, debugging, rollback, and delivery guidance
defaultPrompt: Inspect configured ServiceNow profiles and development context.
Implement this story in the correct instance and update set.
Debug this ServiceNow behavior and verify the fix.
